title: Selenium Setup
description: Learn Selenium Setup fundamentals for test automation

questions.question: What is Selenium Setup?
questions.explanation: Selenium is primarily a browser automation tool for testing web applications.

questions.question: Complete the basic Selenium Setup code:

questions.question: Selenium supports multiple programming languages.
questions.explanation: Selenium supports Java, Python, C#, JavaScript, Ruby, and more.

questions.question: Which browsers does Selenium support?
questions.explanation: Selenium supports Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and more.

questions.question: What is WebDriver in Selenium?
questions.explanation: WebDriver is the API that controls browsers in Selenium.

questions.question: What's wrong with this Selenium Setup code?
questions.explanation: Always initialize the WebDriver before use.

questions.question: Selenium Setup requires manual waits for all elements.
questions.explanation: Selenium provides implicit and explicit waits.

questions.question: Which Selenium Setup component is most important?
questions.explanation: Each Selenium component serves specific purposes.
